tasks.title: Keep orchestration rules aligned with AGENTS.md
tasks.notes: Initial rule set for file ownership, validation gates, and MCP-first boundaries.

tasks.title: Add task queue automation script
tasks.notes: Machine-readable task selection and validation commands now scaffold the orchestration flow.

tasks.title: Add reviewer checklist output
tasks.notes: Use after the next feature implementation to record review findings and residual risks.

tasks.title: Add task brief generator for sub-agent handoff
tasks.notes: Reusable handoff briefs now include file ownership, role guardrails, and suggested validation commands.

tasks.title: Add claim and status update automation
tasks.notes: Orchestrator can now claim pending tasks and move them across lifecycle states with dry-run support.

tasks.title: Add reviewer checklist automation
tasks.notes: Reviewer checklists can now be generated from task metadata and written to docs/review-notes.md.

tasks.title: Prepare subagent runner automation
tasks.notes: The orchestrator can now emit a spawn-ready OpenClaw subagent task payload for the next pending task.

tasks.title: Connect orchestration runner to live OpenClaw session spawning
tasks.notes: Document and prototype how the generated run payload maps to sessions_spawn and sessions_yield in a live OpenClaw orchestrator session.
